label: run
command: if [[ "$ZED_FILE" == *"/examples/"* ]]; then cargo nextest run --example "$ZED_STEM"; elif [[ "$ZED_FILE" == *"/tests/"* ]]; then cargo nextest run --test "$ZED_STEM"; elif [[ "$ZED_STEM" == "lib" ]]; then cargo nextest run --lib; elif [[ "$ZED_STEM" == "main" ]]; then cargo nextest run --bins; else cargo nextest run "$ZED_STEM"; fi
